final_text:
Correct! The `./src/query/index.rs` file only has `parse_file` in comments, so it should be excluded. Here's the final list:

```json
[
  "src/index.rs",
  "src/parser/c_lang.rs",
  "src/parser/cpp.rs",
  "src/parser/csharp.rs",
  "src/parser/go.rs",
  "src/parser/java.rs",
  "src/parser/javascript.rs",
  "src/parser/python.rs",
  "src/parser/ruby.rs",
  "src/parser/rust_lang.rs",
  "src/parser/treesitter.rs",
  "src/parser/typescript.rs"
]
```

trace.result_preview: error: DuckDB index is empty under /Users/gaurav/Downloads/SuprSend/sigil — run `sigil index` first
ERROR: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'rg'

input.command: for file in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/query/index.rs; do echo "=== $file ==="; grep -n "parse_file" "$file" | head -5; done

for file in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs ./src/query/index.rs; do
  # Check if file has parse_file( (call site)
  if grep -q "parse_file\s*(" "$file"; then
    # Exclude lines that are just definitions (fn parse_file)
    if grep "parse_file\s*(" "$file" | grep -qv "^\s*fn\s*parse_file"; then
      echo "$file"
    fi
  fi
done

for file in ./src/index.rs ./src/parser/c_lang.rs ./src/parser/cpp.rs ./src/parser/csharp.rs ./src/parser/go.rs ./src/parser/java.rs ./src/parser/javascript.rs ./src/parser/python.rs ./src/parser/ruby.rs ./src/parser/rust_lang.rs ./src/parser/treesitter.rs ./src/parser/typescript.rs ./src/query/index.rs; do
  # Get actual call lines (not definitions, comments starting with //)
  call_count=$(grep "parse_file\s*(" "$file" | grep -v "^\s*//" | grep -v "^\s*\*" | grep -v "^\s*fn\s*parse_file" | wc -l)
  if [ "$call_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "$file: $call_count calls"
  fi
done
